title: Business Development & Sales (Tech/Software) - Internship
description: Join our founding team as a Business Development & Sales Intern and help us identify and pitch custom software solutions to businesses and startups.
responsibilities: Lead sourcing: Identify and collect contact details (phone/email) of small business owners, startup founders, and niche professionals who need custom software or websites.
Cold outreach & calling: Conduct daily outbound calls and send personalized LinkedIn/WhatsApp messages to pitch our software services.
Requirement gathering: Engage with potential clients to understand their technical needs and schedule demo meetings for the founding team.
CRM management: Maintain a database of all leads contacted and follow up consistently until a project is secured.
Market research: Identify trending niches (like GST tools or AI content tools) where businesses are currently looking for software solutions.
requirements: Available for work from home job/internship
Can start between 21st Apr'26 and 12th Jun'26
Women wanting to start/restart their career can also apply
otherRequirements: Need someone with a thick skin who is not afraid of rejection on calls
Excellent verbal English/local language skills and a result-oriented mindset are mandatory
eligibility: Open to freshers and experienced professionals with relevant skills

title: Frontend Developer - Internship
description: Build beautiful, responsive web applications using React and TypeScript. Work on real projects that will be used by thousands.
responsibilities: Develop responsive user interfaces using React and TypeScript
Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect designs
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
Participate in code reviews and contribute to best practices
requirements: Available for work from home internship
Can start between 21st Apr'26 and 12th Jun'26
Strong foundation in JavaScript and React

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: A Technical Support Engineer provides technical assistance to customers, resolves product issues, troubleshoots incidents, and ensures smooth product usage.
responsibilities: Respond to customer technical issues via email

and resolve product problems
Handle support tickets and maintain SLAs
Escalate complex issues to engineering when needed
Reproduce bugs and document issues clearly
Assist customers with onboarding and product setup
Monitor recurring issues and suggest product improvements
Maintain knowledge base articles and support documentation
Support deployments

and configuration tasks
Provide basic training or guidance to users
requiredSkills:
Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills
Understanding of software applications

and logs
Familiarity with ticketing systems (Jira

and SQL knowledge
Good communication and customer-handling skills
Ability to prioritize and manage multiple issues
